product.title: Espoir NEW Be Velvet Cushion Foundation #23.5 Fair Olive | Quick and Easy Coverage with Long-lasting Color by Zero Oxidation, Velvety Smooth Finish & Lightweight Formula, Vegan, Korean Makeup, 0.46 oz
featureBullets: LONG-LASTING COLOR WITHOUT OXIDIZATION : Enjoy vibrant, true-to-tone foundation that resists oxidation. Keep your skin looking fresh all day with long-lasting color that won’t darken or change throughout the day

QUICK AND EASY COVERAGE : No need to control the amount like with liquid foundation. Simply pick up the perfect amount with the puff and apply for fast, seamless coverage that effortlessly adheres to your skin

FLAWLESS FULL COVERAGE FOUNDATION : Achieve a flawless, airbrushed complexion with buildable, full coverage. Conceal imperfections, redness, and uneven skin tone effortlessly for a smooth and perfect finish

VELVETY SMOOTH FINISH FOR ALL-DAY COMFORT : Experience a velvety smooth texture that’s lightweight and breathable. Get that soft-focus look without the heaviness, for a natural and comfortable wear all day long

★TRUE OLIVE SHADES CRAFTED WITH DEEP EXPERTISE & CUTTING-EDGE TECHNOLOGY : Developed in collaboration with a renowned beauty influencer who possesses a deep understanding of olive skin tones. Specially designed to match the unique undertones of olive skin, delivering a flawless and natural finish

CLEAN & SAFE FORMULA FOR HEALTHY SKIN : Our vegan certified and cruelty free foundation is made with clean, skin-friendly ingredients. Enjoy healthy, irritation-free coverage that is gentle on your skin and provides all-day hydration

specification.value: #4,394 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #52 in Foundation Makeup
Paraben Free, Fragrance Free, Alcohol Free, Silicone Free, Gluten Free, Phthalate Free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides excellent coverage that's buildable, with a perfect fair-light olive neutral match and a satin matte finish that looks natural on the face. The product is particularly suitable for oily textured and mature skin, applying smoothly and feeling like a second skin. While some customers report it lasts a long time, others mention it dries out within a week and a half.

reviews.reviewTitle: Very nice foundation. Love this formula.
reviews.reviewText: Very pretty foundation. I just happened to buy the wrong color. It goes on smoothly and feels and looks light even though it’s full coverage. The finish is natural and more dewy than matte. It’s easy to apply and lasts all day. I normally purchase the lightest shades but these are extra light in my opinion. It made my already pale skin look almost ghostly white. 😂 Not quite the look I was going for. And I didn’t even get the lightest shade (I got #20 vanilla). I recommend you choose your shade carefully. The formula is beautiful though. I am 57 and think this is great for older ladies as well as younger ones. It didn’t not emphasize any wrinkles or make my skin look cakey in any way. There’s no fragrance that I could detect and it wasn’t sticky at all. I have sensitive skin and it wasn’t not irritating. The only caveat is that I’m not sure how much you really get as this was my first time buying a cushion foundation.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 27, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is amazing!!! It’s easy to use, apply, and does well with my current products in my makeup routine. The compact case with the sponge and mirror makes it so easy to travel with or put in a bag. The coverage is light to medium which I like and it’s more of a natural-somewhat matte finish. Not sticky at all. The best part: IT IS MY CORRECT SHADE!!! It does not oxidize at all, and it looks like my true skin tone. As a pale olive toned girl, I can hardly ever find a true shade match. Thank you Monica Ravi-Conway!!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026

reviews.reviewText: GENIUNE REVIEW: So I actually didn’t really know my shade so I got the sample pack off of the tiktok shop (which is SUPER helpful). The coverage is crazywork because I didn’t even use a color corrector or concealer and it COVERED my dark circles A LOT. It made my skin look so smooth (like the douyin girls) and minimized my skin texture visibility? A little does go quite a bit in my opinion. A little does go a little further if you do skin prep and use it on hydrated and moist skin. (Please do not use this product on dry/patchy/flaky skin or results will obviously not be great). The formula is really thin and skin-like. It doesn’t feel sticky or powdery afterwards. I’ve had it on for about two hours now and it hasn’t melt? Not really melt but like when it does that thing where it becomes patchy and soaks into your skin texture. It’s not moisturing but it also doesn’t dry out your skin. It more so just stays at the top layer of your skin? If this is your first foundation cushion, don’t tap it into the foundation and immediately apply it to your face. Tap it onto where the sponge goes (the lid that goes over the sponge of foundation). This will make sure that the foundation goes on even. It’s honesty amazing for a first cushion, everyday cushion, EVERYTHING cushion. As a 17 year old with skin issues, I LOVE THIS CUSHION. P.S. if you decide that your want the TIRTIR cushion, it oxidizes BADLY. It turns very yellow or orange (depending on the shade). But if you do get it, get the one that’s pink. :)
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 3, 2025

reviews.reviewText: The color match is amazing, and it applies so smoothly - it truly feels like a second skin! It’s incredibly lightweight, yet you can still build it up to full coverage by tapping it into the skin. I also love the added skincare benefits. Just a heads up, it does have a slight scent. My only issue is that it tends to slide off after a few hours. I use a matte primer and finishing spray, but I’m still having trouble with longevity. If anyone else has experienced this and found a way to make it last, please share! If I could get it to stay put, I’d absolutely keep repurchasing -it’s my favorite foundation, and I’ve tried a lot!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 21, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Excellent color and coverage while still being lightweight and incredibly blendable. I tried different foundation brands including Estée Lauder double wear (6W1 and 6W2), Haus labs (450 & 460), and Juvias natural radiance liquid (Gabon and Lagos) and they were all too red, yellow, or neutral/ashy around my face’s outer edges. I’m shocked that this brand with limited colors is the only one that has my exact shade and undertone (Suntan) and it doesn’t even look ashy on my hyperpigmentation! I included pictures of Suntan vs Hazel for anyone who’s my shade/undertone twin to reference. I’ve only had it on for 6 hours and it still looks great with setting powder + spray (referenced in 3rd pic, first 2 pics are foundation only 5 mins after application.) While it doesn’t seem to oxidize much, it does seem to transfer a bit when rubbed intentionally. Honestly I can’t tell if it’s the setting powder or foundation that’s transferring. Either way I’m soo happy I found this brand, such a great value just wish I could find an estee lauder shade/undertone to match. FYI you can find samples for espoir foundation on the TikTok shop.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 9, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Great coverage but very dry looking
reviews.reviewText: Pros Amazing coverage. Evened out my complexion very well with minimal product. Good shade range. Cons So dry looking. I have combo skin. Maybe even slightly dry this time of year. I prepped my skin with moisturizer AND a hydrating primer. (Left time for them to absorb.) This foundation still looked dry and cakey when applied. I hit it with 2 more layers of hydrating spray and it looked a little better, but still not great. Also the puff did not deposit color into my light forehead creases so maybe would still need to use a brush to touch up those areas. Might be good if you have really oily skin and no age lines.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 27, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is amazing!!! It’s easy to use, apply, and does well with my current products in my makeup routine. The compact case with the sponge and mirror makes it so easy to travel with or put in a bag. The coverage is light to medium which I like and it’s more of a natural-somewhat matte finish. Not sticky at all. The best part: IT IS MY CORRECT SHADE!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 27, 2026
